reviews.review_description:
I honestly have no idea what game these other reviewers played but the one I just played is trash. You’re armed with a pea shooter which takes 10 shots to down a zombie. There’s zero reloading. Just point and click.  Are these paid reviews? Friend reviews maybe? There’s absolutely no way this game is a 4.8/4.9 $20 game.  I’d have been mad if I spent $1 on this garbage…. $20 is a grift, pure and simple. 
DO NOT BUY THIS!  My 15 yr old son could make a better vr game than this and I don’t even have kids! Return to sender asap

I was blown away by how chaotic and fun this game is. Hundreds of zombies rushing at you simultaneously creates an intense, heart-pumping experience that VR was made for. The weapon variety is impressive — from pistols to grenade launchers, each weapon feels satisfying and distinct. Multiple game modes keep things fresh and give you reasons to come back. Honestly one of the most entertaining shooters on Quest right now. If you love action and survival games, this is a must-have!

I was very curious about Zombie Survival VR, especially with its near-perfect rating (4.9⭐ from 40 reviews), and it quickly became clear why players love it so much.

The game is perfectly adapted to VR and fun right from the start. You begin each wave with a basic, underpowered gun, but the progression system is smart and rewarding: the more accurately you shoot zombies, the better weapons you unlock during the run. That steady power climb makes the experience incredibly satisfying, especially after 10 minutes of mowing down growing hordes of undead.

There’s also a nice layer of strategy. You can choose to spend your cash on turrets to help control the waves or repair fences to slow the invasion, forcing meaningful decisions while under pressure. With three different levels to choose from and leaderboards to compete on, replayability is strong.

Simple, effective, and extremely fun—this is a great zombie survival experience that proves how well wave shooters can shine in VR. Highly recommended 🧠💥

There’s a lack of a necessary tutorial. The game requires an estimated 10’ X 20’ space to walk around on. Since most people don’t have that space available, the game allows you to move via the joysticks without telling you that. I only noticed once a developer told me that. The game would work well in a gym with multiple people, but seems limited as a single player (and best played in a chair for single player and move only using the joysticks). I would suggest to the developers to allow for height modification so the player can sit down and still be “standing height” in the game.

reviews.review_title: Perfect for a zombie shooting game
reviews.review_description:
The atmosphere in this game is so immersive. The sound effects and haptics really add to the suspense and adrenaline-pumping action. It's a must-play for any zombie survival fan.

The difficulty level in this game is perfect. It's challenging enough to keep you on your toes, but not so hard that it becomes frustrating. It's a great balance of fun and excitement.
Good job with this game! 🫡👍🏻
It worth it. Very entertaining and no time to get bored. It is a good experience, better than other zombie games out there
This is a very enjoyable game.
Hope more maps are coming soon 👍🏻⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Fine game. Lots of hoards of zombies

This is the best zombie game i played on VR. I enjoy the gameplay mechanics and the graphics of this game.
Good job developer!
The monster look and walk so weird! It is scarry!
